OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: { "CPAId": "0rR7x0000000DQIEA2", "Type": "0hs7x0000007K8bAAE", "BonusMeasureType": "NA", "PCAId": "0s47x0000000BY9AAM", "Shift__c": "a4Q7x000000DW0TEAW", "CPAStatus": "DRAFT", "FacilityTitleName": "Ambassador NP/PA", "ShiftName": "ShiftNew", "RecordtypeName": "Clinician", "CPAName": "Test Service Account 002-Shift", "TargetMeasurePercent": 0, "BonusPayout": 0, "ContractPaymentAgreementId": "0rR7x00000006rpEAA", "CPAType__c": "Shift", "CPAKey": "B05B7575379D489BFBE3E333EED64291683356099", "Name": "PCA-1332", "CPAContractId": "8007x00000ZrTqvAAF", "FacilityTitle__c": "0hs7x0000007K8aAAE", "CPAAccount__c": "0017x000017KgM0AAK", "OverrideProhibited": true, "CPAAgreementType": "Preventive Care Agreement", "selectRate": true, "AccountName": "Test Service Account 0012", "Unit_of_Measure__c": "per Hour", "Rate__c": 1, "TypeName": "Ambassador Physician", "omniScriptId": "0jN7x0000004BrJEAU", "elementName": "rateDelete" }
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianContract_DeleteRate

omniProcessElements.name: DeleteAction
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "PreventiveCareAgreement", "Id" : "%PCAId%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DeleteActionCPA
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%RecordtypeName% == \"Clinician\" && SV_Data:PCASize == 1 ", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "ContractPaymentAgreement", "Id" : "%CPAId%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DRFetchPCAData
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%RecordtypeName% == \"Clinician\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "CPAId" : "%CPAId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRFetchPCAData", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: ResponseAction
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%RecordtypeName% == \"Practice Operations\"", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "error" : "Client rate cannot be deleted" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { "StatusCode" : 500 }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
